events.fact: Built a cooking station over the campfire.
Discovered a beehive near the initial shelter.
Marked a raspberry patch on the map.
Discovered abandoned structures containing gold and flint arrows.
Discovered an abandoned village and encountered a one-star boar.
Marked the abandoned village location on the map.
Discovered a second Eikthyr altar and reached the western coastline.
Encountered and killed a two-star neck.
Discovered two additional beehives in abandoned buildings.
Built a campfire and workbench at a new exploration site.
Constructed a basic shelter and a bed to set a new spawn point.
Repaired all tools and equipment at the workbench.
Crafted rag trousers, increasing total armor to 2.
Crafted a flint axe, upgrading from the stone axe.
